summary: List Budget View Snapshot Summary Rows
description:
Returns a list of all budget view snapshots summary rows for project status and ad hoc types.
The type of row returned is dependent on
the value used in the group_by query param.

Note: In addition to all the fields outlined in the response, there will be an additional key for each visible
standard, source, and formula column created for the particular budget view.

parameters.name: biller[]
parameters.description: Return item(s) within a specific biller. Format is biller[]=id=1,type=SubJob or biller[]=id=1,type=Project

parameters.name: cost_code_id[]
parameters.description: Return item(s) within a specific Cost Code id or range of Cost Code IDs

parameters.name: cost_code_name[]
parameters.description: Return item(s) within a specific Cost Code name or range of Cost Code names

parameters.name: root_cost_code_id[]
parameters.description: Return item(s) within a specific Root Cost Code id or range of Root Cost Code IDs

parameters.name: root_cost_code_name[]
parameters.description: Return item(s) within a specific Root Cost Code name or range of Root Cost Code names

parameters.name: category_id[]
parameters.description: Return item(s) within a specific category id (line item type id) or range of category IDs

parameters.name: budget_line_item_id[]
parameters.description: Return item(s) within a specific budget line item id or range of budget line item IDs

parameters.name: group_by
parameters.description: Groups the data. Value can be a comma separated string. Default is biller,root_cost_code

parameters.name: budget_row_type
parameters.description: Return budgeted, unbudgeted or all item(s) from all budget rows for a project. Default is all. Note that when the unbudgeted or all values are supplied, the subtotals may change depending on the pr...

schema.description: Array of Budget View Snapshot Summary Rows

id.description: ID of the resource represented by this summary row

name.description: Name of the resource represented by this summary row

biller_type.description: Biller type. Populated if group_by is biller.

budget_line_item_ids.description: List of budget line item ids within this group
